period_locks.image_institution: Thomas du Pré de Saint Maur — Global Creative Resources Fragrance & Beauty
period_locks.film_execution_ref: Johan Renck N°5 L'Eau 2016 — light/appetite codes only, no likeness

makeup_lock_2016.skin: Luminous fresh porcelain — dewy radiance under hard fashion light
makeup_lock_2016.eyes: Soft definition, clean lid; soft smoke only if still luminous
makeup_lock_2016.lips: Full defined cupid's bow; natural deep / dark fashion
makeup_lock_2016.continuity: Same makeup recipe on every face-visible shot

physical.body: Helmut Newton curves — full bust, cinched waist, strong hips, long athletic legs. Flesh visible, never runway-thin.
physical.face: Angular jaw, high cheekbones, wide-set dark eyes, strong brows, full lips

face_map.structure: Angular jaw tapering to defined chin; high cheekbones with shadow plane under cheek
face_map.eyes: Wide-set, dark, almond — calm direct gaze or averted upward (ref pose)
face_map.brows: Strong, dark, natural arch — never over-plucked
face_map.lips: Full, defined cupid's bow; dark lipstick in ECU (shot 08)
face_map.nose: Straight bridge, refined tip — profile visible shot 05
face_map.skin_treatment: Pale porcelain, high-contrast B&W; shots 02/05/07/08 may carry subtle gold-magenta rim light (personal ref N°5 L'Eau codes only — research/lily-rose-n5-leau-2016.md; no likeness)
face_map.hair_detail: Sleek low bun at nape, lacquered finish, center part when front visible
never_in_frame: Sunglasses worn in shot 08 (removing only in 05)
Different face / different woman between shots

A_full_tailleur.pieces: B&W houndstooth tweed jacket + knee skirt, white piping trim, black pumps

B_jacket_open.pieces: Tailleur jacket open at collarbone, lace gloves

bottle.description: Unlabeled faceted crystal rectangular bottle, N°5 silhouette echo, silver/crystal stopper
bottle.continuity: Same bottle object from shot 01 tray through 08 ECU; gone in 09

tray.description: Polished silver rectangular tray — appears 01, 03, 09 (empty bottle beat)

medical.description: Metal tray, syringe, white gloves — shot 04 only (Newton clinic)

dogs.rule: Two black Dobermans OR one greyhound per shot — never both

prompt_prefix: MADAME_X: tall 178cm woman with Helmut Newton curves — full bust, narrow waist, strong hips, long legs. Angular jaw, black lacquered chignon, triple pearl necklace. Luminous 2016 Parfums Beauté makeup: fresh porcelain skin, soft eye definition, strong natural brows, defined lips — same makeup every shot. Structured black-and-white tweed tailleur (2016–2018 house codes). Pale skin, B&W high-contrast fashion photography. Same woman throughout.

fixed_props.bottle: Unlabeled faceted crystal, N°5 silhouette echo
fixed_props.jewelry: Triple-strand pearl necklace when neck visible
fixed_props.dogs: Two black Dobermans OR one greyhound per shot — never both

01.look: Commanding entrance, curves in structured jacket

04.costume: Jacket open at collarbone, gloves, pearls
04.look: Scent on wrist, medical still life
